summary: Core OMS and order-lifecycle events — order submissions, fills, cancellations, and routing decisions.
Captured operational failure scenarios — unhandled exceptions, validation rejections, and system fault injections.
Trade settlement lifecycle — cash movements, custody reconciliation, and ledger commit confirmations.
Portfolio risk metrics and limit checks — VaR calculations, stress-test results, concentration breaches, and counterparty exposure.
Market data ingestion pipeline — equity quotes, FX rates, index snapshots, and pricing feed health.
